code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut current = ""
  mut stop = false

  while i < n and not stop
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end

    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        let v = match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if v < 0
          stop = true
        else
          sum = sum + v
          current = ""
        end
      end
    else
      current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if not stop and not string.is_empty(current)
    let v = match string.parse_int(current)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v >= 0
      sum = sum + v
    end
  end

  println("partial=#{sum}")
end
